default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding discussion and role clarification for new recruiting hire Marília](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Workable is the primary ATS, but some hiring also happens through Upwork and personal networks](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Client Operations role is critical, focusing on building systems/automations for scaling operations](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Hiring process needs refinement; plan to create dedicated Slack channels for each open role](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Timeline aim: Ideally have Client Ops hire start in April, but quality is priority over speed](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)

## Topics

### Current Hiring Landscape

  - [Multiple hiring channels: Workable (primary ATS), Upwork (for freelancers), personal referrals](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Some candidates not in Workable if they come through personal networks](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Plan to move away from Upwork hiring when possible, prefer proper contracts](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Future goal: Managing Directors to become hiring managers for their own pods](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Client Operations Role Details

  - [Focus: Building systems/automations for scaling organization](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Key skills: Identifying inefficiencies, implementing solutions, experience with tools like Zapier](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Example projects: Automating customer updates, building NPS system, streamlining CRM/Notion usage](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Ideal background: Customer success operations, client operations, or relevant biz ops experience](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [Potential title change: Consider "Head of" instead of "Director" to attract more applicants](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)

### Hiring Process Improvements

  - [Create dedicated Slack channels for each open role (e.g., "hire-account-managers")](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Include relevant stakeholders in role-specific channels for streamlined communication](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Marília to be added to "jobs@" email alias for Workable communications](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)

### LinkedIn Recruiter Lite vs Full

  - [Recruiter Lite limited to 3rd-degree connections, full Recruiter has broader reach](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Lite allows 30 InMails/month, full Recruiter allows 150](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Onboarding Plans

  - [Marília to meet with Kyle, Daniel, and Tucker in coming days](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)
  - [Bridget to arrange joint meeting with Marcel for Marília and Tucker to discuss culture/expectations](https://fathom.video/share/oG7WMxgKWmCB534EbYsQL-yFZ4T_7KCV?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
